$comment: D-CSUBSET-INT-CROSS-SIGNEDNESS-CONVERT: the C 6.3.1.3/6.5.16.1 signed<->unsigned implicit assignment conversion in init/assignment/call-arg/return + high-bit reinterpret + U64->I32 narrowing. The `intCrossSignednessConverts` gate (c-subset ON) admits it; without the gate each `int = unsigned` rejects S_TypeMismatch so this won't compile (the red-on-disable). Values ride mutable globals (anti-fold); the narrowing arm is value-divergent. Exit 42 iff every conversion is correct. The release arm re-witnesses under the shipped pipeline. ABI-agnostic (`unsigned long long` is U64 on every model) so all four targets witness it.
